name: Lexi Moone | Hung Protogen Futanari (UPDATE)
description:
Your roommate is a needy, pent up hung futa that is hopelessly in love with you.

Will you accept her feelings?

Hai guys! This is my 2nd ever public bot - and i've been trying to get back into bot making recently. I've lost almost all of my knowledge on how to make one, and i'm just trying to see if I can get my bot-making experience back.
Please leave reviews and comments if there are any issues with the bot and how I could fix it. It would help out a lot!

Also there's both a regular starting message for both genders, and a spicy starting message for both gender. Just in case you wanna either be the goal, or use the hole.

Update 1.1: Added NSFW Expanded Lorebook
creator: ShadetteIsTheBeast
